name: em-workflow
description: Unified SDD + parallel-implementation + dynamic-review workflow. /em-workflow:develop drives spec → plan (task decomposition with complexity/domain tagging) → wave-based parallel implementation in git worktrees (each implementer merges its own task via flock-serialized merge-task.sh) → dynamic review selection (rule floor + orchestrator discretion) with skill-injected generic reviewers → bounded auto-fix → retrospect collection. Review rounds persist to feature-docs/{feature}/reviews/roundN.yaml; state SSOT is workflow.yaml. workflow.yaml-sourced shell commands are user-approved once per project (approval store outside the repo) and enforced deterministically by a bundled PreToolUse hook. Also provides /em-workflow:review for standalone reviews and /em-workflow:retrospect for cross-feature lesson mining.
